title: Vocational School of Health Services Research and Development
content:
Vocational School of Health Services Research and Development

Research Strategy and Goals

Our college's research strategies and objectives are in line with our University's 2024-2028 Strategic plan.

Research Strategy of Our School:

To increase the efficiency of producing, disseminating and making the information available to the public.

Increasing research resources and effectiveness

Strengthening the culture of science, research, creativity and innovation

Research Objectives of Our School:

Making science, creativity and innovation visible

Strengthening the research infrastructure and diversification of resources

Developing research and enabling structures and processes

Sharing research results with the public through popular publications and mass media other than academic publications

Converting research outputs to sources

Promoting research in curriculum

Ensuring the visibility of the research both at the university and among external stakeholders

Providing internal and external stakeholder sharing in the process of creating research outcomes

Research Resources

In line with the 2024-2028 Strategic Plan of our university, our R&D, PARGE and Application and Research Centers provide physical infrastructure and financial resources for research and development activities. (Bkz.

https://uskudar.edu.tr/arge

)

Research Performance Monitoring and Improvement

The research activities of our college are monitored through the Activity Tracking System (FTS) (See

https://fts.uskudar.edu.tr/login

The determination, implementation, control of the policies and targets for performance improvement and the measures to be taken are at the planning stage.
